name: @sdsrs/agentsmd
description: A global coding-discipline spec for Codex, enforced by native Codex hooks + a rule-hit telemetry closed loop. Independent of oh-my-codex.
author: agentsmd

scripts.test: node scripts/tests/init.test.js && node scripts/tests/analyze.test.js && node scripts/tests/install.test.js && node scripts/tests/audit.test.js && node scripts/tests/drift.test.js && node scripts/tests/distribution.test.js && bash hooks/tests/smoke.sh
